title: The Children’s Condition Worsens

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So thanks - I really am grateful!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What happened to the pretty captain?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ugh... was once not enough for him?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Smoke- San's lying unconscious as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Don't get so worked up, all right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: You'll find what you're looking for there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Did they get beaten by Tra-Dude ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: smoke- San and the captain are ....!!

summary: The Children’s Condition Worsens. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
